'''Dobbs''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served in the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']] where he served in the [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] assigned to [[Cadet Leader|Cadet leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]].

Once the [[assault boat]] landed, Dobbs along with [[Trang]] and [[Sutu]] was assigned as a scout of his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] to check the area; he cursed his luck as this made him exposed, but he reported that he found nothing.

He participated in the ensuing [[Battle of AX-456|battle]] on [[AX-456]], after which only 6 survived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
